summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WTF Agency landing page. All major features working correctly with black and white color scheme maintained.
passed_tests: WTF logo displays with 4 white circles containing W, T, F, ¿
Hero section with Brief Destroyers title and black background
Philosophy section with WHITE background and BLACK text
Process section shows 5 steps: Think, Make, Move, Learn, Scale
What We Solve section with 6 problem cards
Client logos marquee with brand names in Anton font
Case studies section with 6 cards showing client names as logos: Motorola, Absolut, Honda, Ford, Samsung, Havana Club
Images in case studies are grayscale by default with hover effects
Offices section shows 6 locations with white background
Contact section with mailto buttons pointing to hello@wtfagency.com
All buttons use black and white colors only (no red/color accents)
Navigation links work and scroll to correct sections
CTA buttons have correct mailto and anchor links
Marquee animation working on client logos
